# S&P Line Striping & Sealcoating

Professional line striping, sealcoating, and ADA-compliant markings for the Central Valley. 12+ years experience, 2400+ projects completed. Licensed and insured in California.

## Services

- [Line Striping](https://www.spstriping.com/#service-line-striping) — Parking lot striping, new layout design, re-striping, and color-coded markings for businesses and properties throughout Fresno and the Central Valley.
- [ADA & Fire Compliance](https://www.spstriping.com/#service-ada-fire-compliance) — ADA-compliant accessible parking spaces, fire lane markings, and regulatory signage to meet California code requirements.
- [Seal Coating](https://www.spstriping.com/#service-seal-coating) — Asphalt seal coating to protect and extend the life of parking lots, driveways, and commercial surfaces.
- [Crack Filling](https://www.spstriping.com/#service-crack-filling) — Professional crack repair to prevent water damage and extend pavement life.
- [Signage](https://www.spstriping.com/#service-signage) — Custom signage including traffic signs, directional signs, and property identification.
- [Recreational Courts](https://www.spstriping.com/#service-recreational-courts) — Court markings for tennis, basketball, pickleball, and multi-sport facilities.

## Company Information

- [Contact Us](https://www.spstriping.com/#contact) — Get a free estimate for line striping, sealcoating, or ADA compliance work in Fresno, Clovis, Visalia, Modesto, and surrounding Central Valley areas.
- [Our Work](https://www.spstriping.com/#our-work) — View our project gallery featuring completed striping, seal coating, and signage jobs throughout California.
- [Reviews](https://www.spstriping.com/#testimonials) — Customer testimonials from satisfied property managers, business owners, and homeowners.
- [Service Area](https://www.spstriping.com/#coverage) — Fresno, Clovis, Visalia, Modesto, Madera, Tulare, Hanford, and the greater Central Valley region.
